item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, sistem hukum kita juga menyediakan perlindungan hukum untuk hak-hak individu, terutama ketika ada konflik antara kepentingan umum dan kebebasan pribadi.

notes: Agent A starts with clear support for society-first priority, then moves to a balanced position that still values collective considerations but explicitly protects individual rights. Agent B remains consistently rights-first and constitutionalist. Agent B's final English turn contains a non-Latin script artifact: "individual and集体 interests".
